mapper.sql: document_id AS documentId, title, category, object_key AS objectKey, status, chunk_count AS chunkCount, created_at AS createdAt
chunk_id AS chunkId, document_id AS documentId, chunk_index AS chunkIndex, content, embedding::text AS embedding, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_documents (document_id, title, category, object_key, status, chunk_count, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{title}, #{category}, #{objectKey}, #{status}, #{chunkCount}, now())
INSERT INTO knowledge_chunks (chunk_id, document_id, chunk_index, content, embedding, created_at) VALUES (#{chunkId}, #{documentId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, #{embedding}::vector, now())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY chunk_index
SELECT FROM knowledge_chunks ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{limit}
